name: Old-Fashioned Onion Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds large onions, peeled and sliced thinly
6 slices French bread (up to 8 slices), cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sliced onions in a Crock-Pot.
2. Pour in the melted butter and mix to coat the onions thoroughly.
3. Stir in the cubed bread.
4. Add enough chicken broth to cover, stirring well.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 10 to 18 hours or on High for 4 to 5 hours, stirring occasionally.
6. During the last hour of cooking, stir well.
Serves 6 to 8
